title: Kevin Warsh's Fed is not expected to make any change to rates for a while, according to CNBC Fed Survey
summary_full: The survey respondents do expect the Fed at this week's meeting to remove the easing bias in the statement that has signaled the Fed's next move would likely be a cut.
summary_public: The survey respondents do expect the Fed at this week's meeting to remove the easing bias in the statement that has signaled the Fed's next move would likely be a cut.
